Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5079 0 0}Oh, it looks like there's a door up ahead. Aigis, could you give it a look?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I don't think it's dangerous. It should just transport you somewhere.[n]{f 1 1}
